title: Dungeon RPG: Permafrost
description: This mod adds several structures to frozen biomes with special events
body:
Dungeon RPG: Permafrost transforms frozen biomes into true territories of extreme survival. The icy structures created by the Everyday Experience team are not mere decorations: they are frozen dungeons that challenge players with unique events, where time and cold work against you. Each victory brings rewards, but reaching the loot requires strategy, endurance, and courage. This mod is designed to turn the exploration of snowy landscapes into an epic experience, ideal for modpacks and RPG-style worlds that seek a harsher, more mysterious, and tension-filled atmosphere in the frozen lands.

**This mod features 6 Dungeons, each with a variant and each with its own surprises.**
# 

SNOW BALL

![snowball](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9846abeccd4980e5188a3550041bb8307d844d5a_0.webp)

One of the two largest structures in the mod, it features two event variants, hidden chests, and a pleasant theme.

# 

This mod is part of the Dungeon RPG series, a collection dedicated to expanding the exploration experience with unique and challenging dungeons. All the dungeons are built upon the foundation of the fantastic Unique Dungeon Blocks mod, which introduces a wide variety of blocks designed to bring every corner of the dungeons to life and enrich the overworld adventure. Thanks to this foundation, each Dungeon RPG installment offers distinct scenarios, memorable events, and epic rewards, transforming exploration into a journey filled with suspense, mystery, and fun.


# 


🌐 Join Our Discord Community
Do you have new ideas, improvements for my mods, or have you found a bug? This is the perfect place to share them!

In our Discord community you can:

💡 Submit proposals and suggestions for improving the mods.

🛠️ Report problems and bugs so we can fix them together.

🎮 Show your creativity: you're free to use my mods in your own modpacks.

📢 Share your modpack on the server and show the community your unique style.

This space is designed for us to grow together, with respect and enthusiasm for creating mods and modpacks. Your contribution is always welcome!
